description: Fleet discovery for the cyanheads MCP ecosystem — semantic search + install snippets.
name: io.github.cyanheads/cyanheads-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Port to run the HTTP server on.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: Endpoint path for the MCP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Authentication mode: none, jwt, or oauth.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_AUTH_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Minimum log level: debug, info, notice, warning, error.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL

environmentVariables.description: Remote fleet.json endpoint (schema v2 with baked embeddings).
environmentVariables.name: CATALOG_URL

environmentVariables.description: Background poll interval for fleet.json refresh. 0 disables.
environmentVariables.name: CATALOG_REFRESH_SECONDS

environmentVariables.description: Hugging Face model id for query embedding. Must match fleet.json.embeddingModel.
environmentVariables.name: EMBEDDING_MODEL_ID

environmentVariables.description: Cosine similarity cutoff for cyanheads_search results (0-1).
environmentVariables.name: SIMILARITY_FLOOR
